general.name: Zscaler Certs. The Bay
general.payloads: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><!DOCTYPE plist PUBLIC "-//Apple//DTD PLIST 1.0//EN" "http://www.apple.com/DTDs/PropertyList-1.0.dtd"> <plist version="1"><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>CB832D8E-E329-4C19-A6FD-126CD19AF0E0</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>Configuration</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Saks</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>CB832D8E-E329-4C19-A6FD-126CD19AF0E0</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>Zscaler Certs. L1K.cer</string><key>PayloadContent</key><data></data><key>AllowAllAppsAccess</key><false/><key>KeyIsExtractable</key><true/></dict><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>2D38288E-2C4C-4DF1-8134-D3DF86E0D7C4</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>com.apple.security.root</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Hudson's Bay Company</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>2D38288E-2C4C-4DF1-8134-D3DF86E0D7C4</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>Entrust Root Certification Authority -
